raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Active military service members and veterans will gain access to free legal help in civil cases.",
    "The bill AB 2085 will create the Office of Military Assistance within the California Military Department.",
    "The new office will serve as a clearinghouse for the coordination of attorneys who offer pro bono legal services to service members.",
    "The new legislation will allow active military and veterans access to representation for issues such as family law, consumer fraud, property and landlord issues, and predatory lending.",
    "Some legal services are already provided for military members through the Judge Advocates General (JAG), but there is a gap in service for a variety of legal issues.",
    "The Office of Military Assistance will focus on connecting service members to attorneys offering free legal help in areas such as the Uniformed Services Employment and Reemployment Rights Act, the Servicemembers Civil Relief Act, naturalization and immigration, and creditor and debtor issues."
  ]
}
```
